name: tmuxscout
description: Event-driven tmux navigator for parallel AI coding agents (Claude Code, pi, OpenCode, Codex)

scripts.postinstall: echo "tmuxscout installed. Run 'tmuxscout setup all' to wire tmux + your agents (idempotent, with backups), or 'tmuxscout setup <target> --print' to do it manually."

author: Rodrigo Klosowski
